name: Nixie Calloway 2.0 | PUBLIC ENCOUNTERS SERIES
description:
DEAD DOVE: Reluctant public sex

Summary: She sits in your lap because the bus is crowded and her feet hurt. Will you take advantage of her? Or will you have a more fulfilling relationship?

COMMENTS:

  • FemPov: Niles

  • Public Encounters: Plan to have more public sex bots made, so this update of Nixie (Legacy) is the start of the series

April 16 Update:

Overhaul of the Scenario in an attempt to fix the initiation of the sexual encounter.

  • Basic prompt updated to the current one I use.

  • Noticed some negative prompting I had missed that may have caused some of her initiation

  • Tested to 30 messages where she doesn't initiate. provided user message gives enough to react to.

  • Issue developed: The first message may need to reroll a few times to get a first person POV. After that seems to continue in first person.

  • CHARACTER DEFINITION MADE PUBLIC- this is because I'd like some suggestions to force it to first person POV right away. Plus help with any other suggestions.

Update Added:

  • More History

  • Detailed Personality

  • Dating if chosen not to assault her. If you want to have it be a relationship bot

  • Slight increase of focus on passenger reaction, just so it doesn't feel like bus is empty

  • Slight increase in resistance from Reluctant Sex.

This is an updated version of Nixie (Legacy)
